channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Geopolitical news headlines from Tier 1 sources

item.title: 🇸🇪 Sweden seizes Russian shadow fleet tanker in Baltic Sea
item.description: The Swedish Coast Guard seized a tanker believed to be part of Russia's shadow fleet operating in the Baltic Sea, the latest in a series of similar actions targeting vessels circumventing sanctions.

item.title: 💨 Trump administration halts US wind farm projects over national security
item.description: President Donald Trump's administration has brought US onshore wind development to a halt, citing national security concerns, according to a Financial Times report.

item.title: 🇵🇪 Peru electoral board orders comprehensive audit of election results
item.description: Peru's National Jury of Elections requested a thorough IT audit of the April 12 general election results, raising concerns about the integrity of the electoral process.

item.title: 🇪🇺 ECB warns euro zone recession risks are real amid Middle East conflict
item.description: Bank of Greece governor Yannis Stournaras said recession concerns for the euro zone are "real and justified" if the Middle East conflict continues, with Iran war negotiations key for ECB monetary policy.

item.title: 🚢 Israel extends detention of Gaza flotilla activists
item.description: An Israeli court extended by two days the detention of two activists arrested aboard a Gaza-bound flotilla that was intercepted by Israeli forces in international waters near Greece.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine Drones Strike Russian Baltic Port of Primorsk
item.description: Ukraine launched drone attacks hitting the Baltic Sea port of Primorsk, setting it on fire and striking vessels. The attack targets Russian energy infrastructure as Ukraine escalates strikes deep inside Russian territory.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran proposes 30-day plan to end war as Trump expresses doubts
item.description: Iran submitted a 14-point peace proposal to the US calling for a comprehensive resolution within 30 days. President Trump says he is reviewing the proposal but questions whether Iran has "paid a big enough price" to warrant peace.

item.title: 🇵🇸 Palestinian killed in Israeli West Bank raid
item.description: A Palestinian man was killed during an Israeli raid in the West Bank city of Nablus, according to Palestinian health officials. The incident adds to ongoing tensions in the occupied territories.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Israel approves purchase of F-35 and F-15IA fighter jets
item.description: Israel gave final approval for a plan to purchase two new combat squadrons of F-35 and F-15IA advanced fighter aircraft from Lockheed Martin and Boeing in a deal worth tens of billions of dollars.

item.title: 🇨🇳 China-Philippines trade accusations over South China Sea incident
item.description: China and the Philippines exchanged accusations over a South China Sea incident, with both sides claiming the other engaged in provocative actions in the disputed waters.

item.title: 🇹🇼 Taiwan president defiant as China calls him a 'rat'
item.description: Taiwan President Lai Ching-te arrived in Eswatini after several Indian Ocean nations revoked overflight permission under alleged Chinese pressure. China condemned him as a "rat" while he affirmed Taiwan's right to engage with the world.

item.title: 🇬🇧 Two women die in Channel crossing attempt
item.description: Two women died while attempting to cross the English Channel from France to Britain, highlighting the ongoing dangers of irregular migration routes.

item.title: 🇸🇰 Slovakia's PM Fico to attend Victory Day parade in Moscow
item.description: Slovakia's Prime Minister Robert Fico is among a handful of global leaders due to attend Russia's scaled-back Victory Day parade in Moscow, Russian state TV reported.

item.title: 🛢️ OPEC set for third oil output quota hike since Hormuz closure
item.description: OPEC is expected to agree to its third oil output quota increase since the Strait of Hormuz closure, as the cartel responds to supply disruptions from the Iran conflict.

item.title: 🇱🇧 Hezbollah pays steep price in battle to reverse fortunes
item.description: Hezbollah has suffered heavy losses with hundreds of thousands displaced and thousands of fighters killed as domestic rivals harden opposition to its status as an armed group.

item.title: 🇺🇸 US Secretary of State to travel to Vatican, Italy
item.description: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio is scheduled to travel to the Vatican and Italy for diplomatic talks, according to newspaper reports.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Trump says Iran has 'not yet paid a big enough price'
item.description: President Trump said Iran has not yet paid a sufficient price for peace, publicly musing about the possibility of restarting airstrikes while reviewing a new Iranian peace proposal.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Russia-Ukraine give conflicting accounts of Sumy village
item.description: Russia's Defence Ministry claimed its troops took control of the village of Myropillia in Ukraine's Sumy region, but Ukraine's military denied the village had changed hands.

item.title: 🇰🇵 North Korea calls US cyber threat claims 'disinformation'
item.description: North Korea dismissed US accusations about its cyber threats as "disinformation" and warned of countermeasures, rejecting allegations of malicious cyber activities.

item.title: 🇰🇵 North Korea's Kim casts youth as vanguard amid Russia war role
item.description: North Korean leader Kim Jong Un met delegates to the ruling party's youth league congress, casting young people as central to domestic mobilization and North Korea's military role in Russia's war against Ukraine.

item.title: 🏛️ IAEA reports drone targeting Zaporizhzhia nuclear plant lab
item.description: A drone targeted the external radiation control laboratory at the Russian-held Zaporizhzhia nuclear power plant in southeastern Ukraine, the IAEA reported.

item.title: 🏛️ Russia scales back Victory Day parade, no military hardware
item.description: For the first time since 2007, Moscow's Victory Day parade will feature no military hardware, as authorities plan a scaled-down "military lockdown" format amid the ongoing Ukraine conflict.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Hezbollah pays steep price in battle to reverse its fortunes
item.description: Hezbollah has been severely weakened with hundreds of thousands of its constituents displaced and thousands of fighters killed, as domestic rivals harden their opposition to its status as an armed group.

item.title: 🇸🇰 Slovakia PM Fico to attend Moscow Victory Day parade
item.description: Slovakia's Prime Minister Robert Fico is among only a handful of global leaders due to attend Russia's scaled-back Victory Day parade in Moscow, Russian state TV reported.
